title: More Enchantments
description: Add a disenchanting table, an anvil and more enchantments.
body:
This mod adds several enchantments, an anvil that won’t display "Too expensive", and a disenchanting table.

## Enchantments

### Butcher【sword】level 1
Killing certain mobs drops more food.

### Life Steal【sword】level 1~3
Each attack restores health equal to damage × level × 0.1, and consumes hunger based on the amount healed. Incompatible with Steadfastness.

### Steadfastness【sword】level 1~3
Each attack has a 50% chance to restore your health to level ÷ 4 × player.getMaxHealth(), and consumes hunger based on the amount healed. Incompatible with Life Steal.

### Synergy Strike【sword, axe, trident】level 1
Each attack triggers all items with this enchantment in the inventory to attack ( e.g., if both a Netherite Sword and a Diamond Sword have the Synergy Strike enchantment, the total damage dealt by either sword is 8+7=15 ). Each item name is limited to one instance ( if there are two or more Diamond Swords, only one will take effect ). It has a 5-second cooldown, supports the Sharpness, Smite, and Bane of Arthropods enchantments, and the triggered items will consume durability.

### Ore Vein Mining【pickaxe】level 1
Vein mines ores. The maximum range can be set in the config file, with a default value of 16.

### 1×2 Excavation【pickaxe】level 1
Digs a 1×2 area of stone. Incompatible with 3×3 Excavation.

### 3×3 Excavation【pickaxe】level 1
Digs a 3×3 area of stone. Incompatible with 1×2 Excavation.

### Smelting【pickaxe, axe, shovel and so on】level 1
Drops corresponding items based on furnace recipes when breaking blocks.

### Obtaining
Obtained via villager trading, loot chests, etc. Cannot be acquired from the Enchanting Table.

## Anvil
Has no "Too expensive" limit and is unbreakable.

### Obtaining
Crafting.

## Disenchanting Table
Items inside the Disenchanting Table will display their enchantments. Whether text is shown on the Disenchanting Table and the text color can be modified in the config file.

### Usage
Right-click the Disenchanting Table while holding the item, then right-click the Disenchanting Table while holding a book to remove one enchantment and obtain an Enchanted Book, at the cost of 5 levels of experience.

### Obtaining
Crafting.


这个mod添加了一些附魔，一个没有过于昂贵的铁砧以及祛魔台。

## 附魔

### 屠夫【剑】level 1
击杀部分生物掉落更多食物。

### 生命窃取【剑】level 1~3
每次攻击恢复 伤害值 × level × 0.1 点生命值，并根据回复量消耗饱食度。与坚定不兼容。

### 坚定【剑】level 1~3
每次攻击有50%的概率让生命值恢复至 level ÷ 4 × player.getMaxHealth()，并根据回复量消耗饱食度。与生命窃取不兼容。

### 协击【剑、斧、三叉戟】level 1
每次攻击调用物品栏内所有拥有这个附魔的物品攻击（如下界合金剑+钻石剑都具有协击附魔，其中任意一把剑造成的伤害总计为8+7=15），每个物品名限一次（如有两把或多把钻石剑，那么只有一把生效），cd5秒，支持锋利、亡灵杀手、节肢杀手附魔，被调用的物品会消耗耐久。

### 连锁采矿【镐】level 1
连锁挖掘矿物，最远距离可在config文件里设置，默认16。

### 1×2挖掘【镐】level 1
挖掘1×2范围石头。与3×3挖掘不兼容。

### 3×3挖掘【镐】level 1
挖掘3×3范围石头。与1×2挖掘不兼容。

### 冶炼【镐、斧、铲等】level 1
破坏方块时掉落物根据熔炉配方掉落相应物品。

### 获取
村民交易、战利品箱等，不能通过附魔台获取。

## 铁砧
没有过于昂贵的限制，不会损坏。

### 获取
合成

## 祛魔台
物品在祛魔台内会显示拥有的附魔。祛魔台是否显示文字、文字颜色可在config文件里更改。

### 使用
手持物品右键祛魔台，然后手持书右键祛魔台，可以去掉一个附魔并得到附魔书，消耗五级经验。

### 获取
合成
